today_news.title: OpenAI says ChatGPT Instant now better understands what users actually want
today_news.summary: OpenAI is updating GPT-5.5 Instant, its most-used ChatGPT model. The update targets conversation quality, with better intent recognition, improved context across multiple turns, and more reliable handling of complex, multi-condition prompts.

today_news.title: OpenAI's deployment chief on Codex growth, falling AI prices, and the ROI question
today_news.summary: OpenAI deployment chief Arnaud Fournier explains in an interview how DeployCo wants to embed AI deep inside large corporations using its own engineers. today_news.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil "Jalapeño," a custom chip built for LLM inference
today_news.summary: OpenAI is adding custom hardware to its tech stack. The "Jalapeño" chip, developed with Broadcom, is tailored for large language model inference and is set to run at scale by late 2026.

today_news.title: Snowflake CEO finds GLM-5.2 competitive with Opus 4.7 at a fraction of the cost
today_news.summary: Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 nearly matches Claude Opus 4.7 in a Snowflake benchmark with 103 coding tasks at one-fifth the cost per output token. But the Chinese model burns through nearly twice as many tokens per task. Still, that pricing gap is putting real pressure on Anthropic and OpenAI, and could rattl...

today_news.title: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI are backing an effort to stop respiratory infections
today_news.summary: The common cold comes for us all—often more than once a year. And there is no way to prevent it. The best you can do is take vitamin C and stay away from people with the sniffles. today_news.title: Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants
today_news.summary: Europe is in the middle of a record-breaking heat wave, and the grid is being pushed to its limits as people turn to fans and air-conditioning to try to stay cool.
